Description_1: The ESP32-DEVKITC-32E transceiver evaluation board from Espressif Systems is a powerful development tool for wireless communication technologies. It supports 802.11 b/g/n Wi-Fi and Bluetooth® Smart Ready 4.x (BLE) dual-mode at 2.4GHz, making it ideal for a variety of IoT applications. Equipped with a PCB antenna and 4MB flash, this board provides reliable connectivity and ample memory for developing and testing RF, RFID, and wireless solutions.
